title: Wireframe — Product / Service Page
description: Detailed product page with hero, features, pricing comparison, FAQ, testimonials, and footer.

customization_guide.hero_image: Product screenshot or demo video (1200×800px minimum)
customization_guide.features: Update 3 core features with icons and descriptions
customization_guide.pricing: Input your 3 tier names, prices, and feature lists
customization_guide.comparison: Customize feature row labels and include/exclude logic
customization_guide.faq: Add 8–12 real customer questions and answers
customization_guide.testimonials: Replace with 3+ verified customer quotes and avatars
customization_guide.final_cta: Primary action: 'Start Free Trial' or 'Buy Now'

seo_considerations.meta_title: 40–60 characters, include product name and key benefit
seo_considerations.h1: Page hero headline (should be unique, not repeated elsewhere)
seo_considerations.structured_data: Add Product or SoftwareApplication schema.org markup
seo_considerations.image_alt_text: Descriptive alt text for all product images (SEO + a11y)

conversion_optimization.form_fields: Keep to minimum (name, email, company at top of funnel)
conversion_optimization.social_proof: Include customer logos, testimonials, case studies
conversion_optimization.trust_signals: SSL badge, awards, certifications, user counts

notes: Product pages need to balance education with conversion. This wireframe combines 9 sections optimized for buyers at different decision stages. Hero → Features → Pricing → Comparison → FAQ → Testimonials → Final CTA.
